message:
feat(restore_layout): Cx-first restore_with_cx (ft-xbnl0.2.3)

Add `LayoutRestorer::restore_with_cx(cx, snapshot)` Cx-first sibling
of `LayoutRestorer::restore`. Two checkpoint seams:

1. Pre-flight `cx.checkpoint()?` gates the restoration before any
   mux spawn/split commands fire.
2. Per-window `cx.checkpoint()?` between iterations makes
   cancellation responsive for multi-window restores where each
   window involves many expensive spawn operations.

Legacy path preserved — `restore_with_cx` does not replace or alter
`restore`; it sits beside it.

Regression test `restore_with_cx_matches_legacy` pins shape parity:
legacy vs cx-first RestoreResult must match on panes_created,
windows_created, tabs_created, failed_panes.len(), and
pane_id_map.len() for a 2-pane horizontal split topology. Both paths
must populate pane_id_map for all old pane IDs.

Verified via fork bypass (CC=llvm clang, CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/
ft-rusticmaple-target): 64/64 restore_layout tests pass.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
